triggers.prompt: The client sent an email with these fields: loyalty_tier, signup_date, referral_source
Here's a list of signals we should evaluate: demo_requested, plan_type, last_login_days
Can you check which of these fields are available in BQ? company_size, industry, annual_revenue
Triage these candidate features against our warehouse
The client's funnel definition mentions these fields: page_views, form_submissions, demo_bookings
Check data availability for these signals: tenure_months, product_tier, support_tickets
Which of these fields should we add to the model? lead_source, campaign_status, account_rating
Parse this client email for potential model signals
We got a new field list from the client team — here are the columns
Assess these candidate data sources for the propensity model
What signals can we actually use from this list of CRM fields?
The client mentioned these data points in the meeting: plan type, usage frequency, support tickets
Here are the CRM fields they want us to look at: LeadSource, AccountType, OpportunityStage
Which of these Salesforce fields exist in our warehouse? AccountSource, CampaignId
Bulk check these columns for coverage in BigQuery
We received a field mapping document — what's usable?
Sort these candidate signals by feasibility
Run signal triage on these fields from the client spreadsheet
Classify these candidate features as GO or NO-GO
Data availability check for client fields: zip_code, annual_spend, referral_count
Evaluate the AUC of the loyalty_tier feature against our conversion target
Should we extend the training window from 6 months to 12 months?
What hyperparameters should I tune for the XGBoost model?
Deploy this model to production on Cloud Run
Review this pull request for the feature pipeline
Fix this failing test in the scoring module
What model architecture should I use for churn prediction?
Run a deep diagnostic on conversion_flag — I need IV, PSI, and distribution plots
Compare XGBoost vs LightGBM for this use case
Write unit tests for the pipeline

test_cases.prompt: The client sent this email: 'We'd like you to look at Account Type, Annual Revenue, Number of Employees, Industry, Lead Source.' Parse these for triage.
Classify these signals: loyalty_tier (34% coverage, has created_date), demo_flag (8% coverage, has event_timestamp), fax_opt_in (0.006%, 6 rows), household_income (12%, no timestamp)

assertions.description: Produces signal inventory table with required columns

test_cases.prompt: Assess temporal feasibility for: created_date (has timestamp), gender (static attribute), last_login_date (derived from event log), satisfaction_score (no timestamp found)

assertions.description: Does not classify unguarded field as GO

test_cases.prompt: Check for composites among: sat_score (40%), act_score (35%), country_code (95%), has_filed_tax_return (10%), loyalty_tier (50%), purchase_stage (60%)
Triage these fields: gender, race, disability_status, plan_type, signup_source

assertions.description: Flags demographic fields for ethical review
Does not auto-approve demographics without review

test_cases.prompt: Triage complete. 4 GO, 3 DEFER, 2 NO-GO from 9 signals. Generate the handoff summary.

assertions.description: Summarizes GO count as X of Y

test_cases.prompt: Generate the coverage check SQL for loyalty_program_tier in BigQuery table crm_account

assertions.description: Gets top values for categorical fields

test_cases.prompt: Parse and normalize these client field names: 'Lead Source', 'Annual Revenue', 'Number Of Employees', 'CampaignMemberStatus'

edge_cases.prompt: The client email doesn't mention any specific fields, just says 'we have lots of data we'd like to integrate'
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Does not proceed with triage. Asks for specific field list or offers schema exploration.

assertions.description: Does not hallucinate fields to classify

edge_cases.prompt: All 8 fields came back with <2% coverage or no temporal guard. Everything is NO-GO.
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Reports all NO-GO, checks composites, suggests alternatives.

edge_cases.prompt: I can't connect to BigQuery right now. Can you still triage these fields: loyalty_tier, signup_date?
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Best-effort classification based on metadata. Marks unverified signals.

edge_cases.prompt: Check these fields: Lead Source, lead_source, LEAD_SOURCE, LeadSource — same thing four ways
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Deduplicates to single candidate, notes variations.

assertions.description: Does not count duplicates as separate candidates

edge_cases.prompt: Some fields are in BigQuery, some in Postgres, some in Snowflake. Triage: user_id, plan_type, payment_status
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Uses correct SQL dialect per warehouse, notes source for each field.

edge_cases.prompt: Triage: ssn_last_four, date_of_birth, gender, race, disability_status, religion, annual_income
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Flags PII and demographic fields. Does not auto-approve without review.

edge_cases.prompt: The client sent 150 candidate fields in a spreadsheet. How should we approach this?
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Groups by domain, batches queries, produces scannable output.

edge_cases.prompt: Can you check if loyalty_tier is a good feature?
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Recognizes single-feature ambiguity. Routes to ml-feature-evaluator or does minimal triage.

edge_cases.prompt: INFORMATION_SCHEMA access is denied. Can you still check plan_type and signup_date?
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Falls back to SELECT with LIMIT queries.

assertions.description: Applies LIMIT for safe fallback queries

edge_cases.prompt: Here are the fields: ,,, loyalty tier,, , annual revenue ,  , ,lead source,
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Strips empty entries and whitespace, extracts 3 valid fields.

assertions.description: Extracts and normalizes despite malformed input
Does not include empty entries as candidates

edge_cases.prompt: Check these fields from the international client: código_postal, número_empleados, fecha_creación
edge_cases.expected_behavior: Handles unicode field names, attempts to find matching warehouse columns.

assertions.description: Attempts warehouse lookup despite unicode names
